definition:
1. an organ, instrument, tool, for making  or doing  a thing, (Sophocles Tragicus), etc.:—;of a person, ἁπάντων ἀεὶ κακῶν ὄργ. (Sophocles Tragicus) 
2. an organ of sense , (Plato Philosophus) 
3. a musical instrument , (Plato Philosophus) 
4. a surgical instrument , (Xenophon Historicus) 
5. a work, product , λαί̈νεα Ἀμφίονος ὄργανα the stony works  of Amphion, i. e. walls of Thebes, (Euripides) (ML)
